body.title: Retroactive: librarian budget_tools.py UU_HOME_DB_URL fallback
body.result: committed pre-existing budget_tools.py UU_HOME_DB_URL fallback fix
body.intention: I intend that the pre-existing budget_tools.py UU_HOME_DB_URL→IGOR_HOME_DB_URL fallback fix and dispatch handler refactor is committed under a named ticket.
body.description:
Pre-existing uncommitted work: unseen_university/devices/librarian/tools/budget_tools.py has two changes — (1) UU_HOME_DB_URL → IGOR_HOME_DB_URL fallback fix, (2) dispatch handler refactored from lambda dict to if/elif pattern. Found during T-devlab-schema-create sprint.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/librarian/tools/budget_tools.py
**Design rules:** external-state; no SQLite
**Scope boundary:** IN — commit the existing work as-is. OUT — no new functionality.
**Completion criteria:** git log shows budget_tools.py committed; tests pass.
